trivia_bullets.text: Temur Banner represents the Temur Frontier, Tarkir's wilderness clan whose value is savagery and physical might. Clan symbol is the dragon's claw; mechanic is Ferocious (bonus when controlling a creature with power 4 or greater). Khan Surrak Dragonclaw leads the clan across frozen tundra and mountain passes.

"Savagery to survive, courage to triumph." No speaker attributed. Temur's is the only banner motto to pair an animalistic virtue (savagery) with a volitional one (courage), suggesting the clan sees brutal survival instinct and deliberate bravery as inseparable qualities.

Illustrated by Daniel Ljunggren. Temur Banner is the only banner in the five-card cycle depicted as a totemic object rather than a textile flag: an animal skull on crossed wooden poles with hanging feathers and cords, consistent with the Temur's shamanic hunter-gatherer identity. Carries the temur clan watermark.

Temur Banner (no. 226) is the highest collector number in the five-banner cycle. The full spread is: Abzan (215), Jeskai (222), Mardu (224), Sultai (225), Temur (226) — with Lens of Clarity (223) inserted between Jeskai and Mardu in KTK's artifact numbering block.

related_cards.name: Temur Charm
related_cards.note: Temur-aligned instant; thematic parallel in the clan cycle

notes.abzan_banner_in_corpus: NOT IN CORPUS — Abzan Banner is KTK-215; no file found
notes.cycle_cohort_trigger: 4 of 5 KTK banners now trivia-passed in corpus (Jeskai 222, Mardu 224, Sultai 225, Temur 226). Abzan Banner (KTK-215) is NOT in corpus. Edgelord trigger: consider creating KTK banner cohort node now at 4/5 trivia-passed, flagging Abzan Banner as corpus gap.
notes.color_magic_tags_check: tags_filter shows colorless-magic only — FLAG: Temur Banner produces G, U, R mana (color_identity G/R/U per Scryfall). The colorless-magic tag is technically not wrong (the card itself has no color), but green-magic, blue-magic, red-magic are absent from tags_filter where the other banners have their color tags. Recommend Edgelord or janitor review.
